parameters.query: SELECT title, start_time, end_time, is_all_day FROM calendar_events WHERE start_time::date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY start_time ASC;

SELECT name, due_date, priority, status, project_name, tags FROM notion_tasks WHERE due_date <= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days') AND status NOT IN ('Done', 'Archived') ORDER BY due_date ASC LIMIT 15;

=INSERT INTO briefing_cache (date, briefing_text, generated_at, data_sources_used) VALUES ('{{ $json.date }}', '{{ $json.briefing_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.generated_at }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data_sources_used) }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (date) DO UPDATE SET briefing_text = EXCLUDED.briefing_text, generated_at = EXCLUDED.generated_at, data_sources_used = EXCLUDED.data_sources_used;
